Localization.Description: vSphere Distributed Switch port state management

EventDescriptions.EventDescription: Port {object.id} of the vSphere Distributed Switch is set to the "up" state on host {event_src.host}
Port {object.id} of the vSphere Distributed Switch is blocked on host {event_src.host}
Port {object.id} of the vSphere Distributed Switch is set to the "down" state on host {event_src.host}
Port {object.id} is disconnected in the vSphere Distributed Switch on host {event_src.host}
Port {object.id} of the vSphere Distributed Switch is unblocked on host {event_src.host}
Port {object.id} is connected in the vSphere Distributed Switch on host {event_src.host}
